title: The Byzantine Generals Problem Decision Flow
description: This flowchart illustrates the core dilemma of the Byzantine Generals Problem, showing how a system of potentially traitorous nodes attempts to reach a unified consensus on an attack or retreat command.
relationships: Commander sends order to all Generals
Generals exchange messages with each other
Traitors send conflicting messages to sabotage consensus
All Loyal Generals must agree on the same action to succeed
